name: TAO Range Failure Reacceptance v1
thesis: In TAO 4h chop conditions, failed excursions from balance can mean-revert once price re-enters value. The edge should come from broad reacceptance after a false break, not exact one-bar reversal timing.
edge_mechanism: range failure mean reversion after value reacceptance
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, contradictory filter behavior, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: False breaks from balance that reverse once value is reaccepted in a chop-dominant regime.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Choppy TAO tends to overextend and snap back; when acceptance returns, trapped breakout traders can fuel the reversal.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: TAO 4h is volatile enough to generate broad excursions while still showing repeated range interactions suitable for mean reversion.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If TAO starts trending instead of ranging, failed-break logic may underfire or never complete.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If trade count is low but the concept looks coherent, widen the reacceptance band before changing exits.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; excursion, reacceptance, and target roles are complementary
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: reduced by using proximity-to-band logic instead of exact-touch reversal bars

long: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.5 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
short: Take profit: EMA_50 or 1.5 * ATR_14, whichever comes first
